calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-26-2012 Off Calendar

Application For Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Jul-05-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Wallace P. Douglass, Clerk: S. Vantree, CSR: Sonia Wong #11288.
Wayne S. Canterbury, Esq. for the plaintiff Parrague Development, Inc.

Default of Defendants William B. Stevenson and Aimee L. Stevenson has been duly entered.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendants as follows:

Damages/Principal - $100,000.00
Interest - $20,164.00
Attorneys' fees - $4,781.00
Costs - $ 1,040.68 for a Total of $ 125,985.00
Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
